title: hieracium pallidum subsp. rupicola
intro: Hieracium pallidum subsp. rupicola is a subspecies of the Hieracium pallidum plant, a type of flowering plant in the dandelion family, known for its yellow flowers and edible leaves. The medicinal properties of Hieracium pallidum subsp. rupicola include its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which have been traditionally used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of consuming the plant's leaves include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting immune function. In herbal preparations, Hieracium pallidum subsp. rupicola is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures to leverage its medicinal properties and provide relief from various health conditions.
